title: After the Japanese Derby: Victory Hashtag!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser wins the Japanese Derby!
Tokyo Racecourse is in shock!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Mihono Bourbon declares Rice
Shower as her biggest threat at the Kikuka Sho
and challenges her publicly, causing the crowd to
go wild!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They clap just as much for the two of them as
they do for Matikanetannhauser.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some spectators find that disrespectful to
Machitan, but she doesn't seem to mind at all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She posts on social media that she plans on doing
her best at the Kikuka Sho. Thanks to her
optimism, she gains a few more new fans.
